home.headline: SMS campaigns without the noise.
home.sub: Build a linear sequence, pick your audience, send or schedule. Built for small ecommerce teams who want speed over complexity.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Use your business account.
login.googleFailed: Google sign-in failed. Try again or use email.

audienceHub.title: Audience
audienceHub.subtitle: Separate lists for SMS (phone numbers) and email campaigns.
audienceHub.phonesDesc: Lists of phone numbers in E.164 format for SMS campaigns.
audienceHub.emailsDesc: Lists of subscriber emails for email campaigns.

campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.subtitle: Linear SMS sequences for your store. Use Monitor / Results on a row to open the full send log (every number, outcome, body, errors) — works after a campaign completes too.

monitor.rateNote: Sends are limited to about 50 SMS per minute per campaign.
monitor.empty: No matching messages for this campaign yet.
monitor.showing: {loaded} of {total} in this filter (load more if available).
monitor.pollPausedPaging: Auto-refresh is limited to the counters while scrolled/paged older rows — close and reopen or change filter to refresh the latest page.

wizard.addMessage: Add message text or a link for at least one step
wizard.title: New campaign
wizard.channelSmsDesc: Direct text messages to your contacts.
wizard.channelEmailDesc: Pick an email list, refine recipients, then generate a campaign email with AI.
wizard.step2Hint: Choose a phone list. Upload or create lists under Audience.
wizard.messagePlaceholder: Your message text. The URL below is appended to the end automatically.
wizard.startNow: Start now (queue sends when you finish)
wizard.compliance: Compliance: ensure recipients have opted in to SMS marketing. This MVP does not manage legal consent for you.

phones.title: Phone numbers
phones.subtitle: E.164 recommended (e.g. +15551234567). Used for SMS campaigns.
phones.addNumbersHint: Paste CSV lines or one number per row.
phones.pastePhones: Paste one phone number per line

emailWizard.step2Hint: Choose an email list. Create lists under Audience → Email addresses.
emailWizard.step3Hint: Send to everyone in the list, or pick specific addresses (pagination keeps the list manageable).
emailWizard.entireAudienceCount: This list has {count} contact(s). Everyone will receive the campaign.
emailWizard.step4Hint: Answer a few questions. We will draft a responsive HTML email with your CTA and optional promo.
emailWizard.senderSectionHint: Saved to your account for all future campaigns. Use an address on a domain you have verified with your email provider.
emailWizard.senderEmailInvalid: Enter a valid business sender email.
emailWizard.purposePh: e.g. Spring sale, win-back lapsed buyers, new collection launch
emailWizard.hasPromo: Include a promo / discount in the copy
emailWizard.freeTextPh: Tone, deadline, product names, legal wording to avoid…
emailWizard.briefRequired: Purpose, target link, and language are required.

emailReady.intro: Review the generated email, add your logo if you have not yet, then choose when to send.
emailReady.senderBlockHint: To change it, use Back to wizard (step 4). It is stored on your profile.
emailReady.senderMissing: No sender address on file — go back to the wizard (step 4) to add your business sender email.
emailReady.senderRequired: Add your business sender email in the campaign wizard before launching.
emailReady.title: Email ready
emailReady.subtitle: Desktop and mobile previews use your saved HTML. Open in a new tab to click through to your landing page.
emailReady.logoHint: Upload a PNG, JPG, WebP, or GIF (max 2MB). It is saved on your profile and appears at the top of future emails.
emailReady.logoOnFile: A logo is on file for your account.
emailReady.logoMissing: No logo yet — the preview shows a placeholder until you upload one.
emailReady.startNow: Start now (queue sends when you launch)
emailReady.emailCompliance: Compliance: send only to people who opted in to marketing email. This app does not track consent for you.

emails.title: Emails
emails.subtitle: Email lists for email campaigns. Use the campaign wizard to send AI-generated messages.
emails.addHint: One email per line (or separated by comma).

google.buildUrlFailed: Could not build sign-in URL. Try again.
google.noRedirect: No redirect URL returned. Check Supabase Google provider settings.
